headline: Index Exit and Upbeat Underwriting Trends Could Be A Game Changer For Progressive (PGR)
summary: In late June 2026, The Progressive Corporation was removed from several Russell growth benchmarks, including the Russell 1000 Growth and Russell Top 200 Growth indices, reflecting index rebalancing rather than a change in the company’s core operations. At the same time, analysts highlighted favorable underwriting trends in personal lines and suggested Progressive could outperform upcoming earnings expectations, underscoring a more constructive fundamental backdrop than the index changes...

headline: 2 Profitable Stocks to Own for Decades and 1 That Underwhelm
summary: Even if a company is profitable, it doesn’t always mean it’s a great investment. Some struggle to maintain growth, face looming threats, or fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their future potential.
